data.body: Impl notes (in progress): the outbound update field set is produced by outbound_fields._map_local_to_jira_fields (mirrored scalars = the de-facto allowlist). A local field that maps but is excluded from the outbound update must emit a deduped BRIDGE_ALERT (dedup key per (ticket,field)) via alert_store, mirroring fetcher._flag_unmapped_statuses (fetcher.py:180-234). Emit at run_differs seam (has repo_root). Preserve behavior (drop still happens; only observability added).
